constraints: Capture method, path, status, durationMs, and requestId on each request log line.
Emit exactly one log line per request.
intent.goal: Every API request emits exactly one structured JSON log line via Pino.
non_goals: No request or response body logging.
success_criteria: Each request produces exactly one valid JSON log line containing all required fields (method, path, status, durationMs, requestId).
Each request gets a unique requestId.
Automated test coverage via node --test verifies the logging behavior.
